summary: Tested W-9 Tax Form redesign. All UI components present and functional. Critical backend issue found: endpoint conflict causes notes and id fields to be missing from stored documents.

critical.issue: Duplicate endpoint in server.py (line ~300) overrides the router endpoint in time_tracking.py. The server.py version: (1) Does NOT accept 'notes' parameter - frontend notes field is ignored, (2) Does NOT generate unique 'id' for documents - uses upsert by employee_id instead, (3) Uses different status value 'pending_review' vs 'submitted'
critical.fix: Remove or update the @app.post('/api/time/w9/upload') endpoint in server.py to use the router version that properly supports notes and generates unique IDs

critical.issue: EmployeeDashboard.jsx line 564 filters documents with `.filter(doc => doc && doc.id)` but server.py endpoint doesn't store 'id' field, causing all submitted W-9s to be hidden from the UI despite being stored in database
critical.fix: Either update server.py endpoint to generate and store 'id' field, OR remove the id filter in frontend

integration_issues.issue: Submitted W-9s don't appear in 'Your Submissions' list due to backend not storing 'id' field

action_items: Fix server.py W-9 upload endpoint to match time_tracking.py router version - add 'notes' parameter and generate unique 'id' for each document
Remove duplicate endpoint in server.py OR ensure router endpoint takes precedence
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line ~300: @app.post('/api/time/w9/upload') endpoint conflicts with time_tracking.py router endpoint - app-level routes override router routes
server.py W-9 endpoint uses upsert which replaces existing W-9 instead of allowing multiple submissions as designed in time_tracking.py
EmployeeDashboard.jsx line 564: .filter(doc => doc && doc.id) will filter out all documents if backend doesn't return 'id' field

success_rate.frontend: 85% - All UI components present, integration issue with W-9 list display due to backend

seed_data_creation: Created test W-9 submission via API to verify upload flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: W-9 UI components all present. Backend endpoint conflict needs to be fixed. After fix, verify: (1) Notes field value is stored and displayed, (2) Multiple W-9 submissions appear in list with status badges, (3) Admin modal shows Preview/Download/Approve/Delete buttons for submitted documents

features_tested.Employee Dashboard - W-9 submission form: PASSED - UI present, notes not saved to DB due to backend issue
features_tested.Employee Dashboard - Submitted W-9s list: FAILED - Documents filtered out due to missing 'id' field
features_tested.Admin Dashboard - W-9 Modal action butto: NOT TESTABLE - No documents with proper structure to test
features_tested.Backend - POST /api/time/w9/upload with: FAILED - server.py endpoint overrides router, notes parameter ignored
